title: Platform Rules
intro: These Rules supplement the TyPlace Terms of Use and establish the main requirements for user conduct, listing placement, transactions, and the use of platform features. The list of violations and possible measures is not exhaustive.

rule1.title: 1.1. Circumventing the platform and moving transactions outside TyPlace
rule1.violation: It is prohibited to exchange contact details, encourage moving to third-party messengers, move payment, order fulfillment, dispute discussion, or other essential transaction terms outside TyPlace where this is used to bypass the internal balance, safe transaction mechanism, fees, support, or the recording of agreements on the platform.
rule1.measure: The platform may remove messages, restrict account features, cancel the transaction, restrict withdrawals, temporarily suspend the account, or apply a permanent ban in case of repeated, serious, or intentional violations.

rule2.title: 1.2. Abuse of reviews, disputes, and support requests
rule2.violation: It is prohibited to manipulate reviews, pressure the other party, blackmail with a review, create fake transactions for reputation purposes, submit false complaints, or abuse the dispute, appeal, or support request systems.
rule2.measure: The platform may remove a review, close a request without satisfaction, restrict access to review and support features, and apply a warning, temporary suspension, or permanent ban.

rule3.title: 1.3. Toxic behavior, spam, and abuse of chats
rule3.violation: Spam, flooding, threats, insults, harassment, hate speech, intrusive advertising, fraudulent messages, manipulation, and any other conduct that disrupts normal communication on the platform are prohibited.
rule3.measure: The platform may remove content, restrict messaging, limit certain features, issue a warning, or apply a temporary or permanent account ban.

rule4.title: 1.4. Disclosure of other people's information and abuse of access
rule4.violation: It is prohibited to publish, transfer, or use personal, payment, confidential, or other sensitive information about users or third parties without sufficient grounds, and to use such information to harm others.
rule4.measure: The platform may remove content, restrict features, block the account, limit operations, and apply other protective measures depending on the severity of the violation.

rule1.title: 2.1. Sale, transfer, and use of TyPlace accounts
rule1.violation: It is prohibited to buy, sell, transfer, rent out, share TyPlace accounts, or create multiple accounts to circumvent bans, limits, restrictions, or platform rules.
rule1.measure: The platform may restrict related accounts, block one or more accounts, limit operations, and apply other security measures.

rule2.title: 2.2. False and misleading listings
rule2.violation: It is prohibited to post listings with false descriptions, hidden conditions, inaccurate prices, false availability of goods or services, or other information capable of misleading a buyer.
rule2.measure: The platform may hide, deactivate, or remove the listing, restrict the posting of new listings, cancel the related transaction, and apply a warning, temporary suspension, or permanent ban.

rule3.title: 2.3. Mass duplication and catalog spam
rule3.violation: Meaningless duplication of listings, spam listings, artificial catalog cluttering, and abuse of identical or almost identical offers without a reasonable need are prohibited.
rule3.measure: The platform may remove or deactivate listings, restrict the publication of new listings, limit seller functions, and apply other measures depending on the scale of the violation.

rule4.title: 2.4. Refusal to participate in good faith in a transaction or dispute
rule4.violation: A seller must not, without sufficient grounds, avoid fulfilling a paid order, ignore important messages related to an active transaction, refuse to participate in a dispute in good faith, or provide knowingly false information when an order is being reviewed.
rule4.measure: The platform may issue a refund for the order, restrict the seller's features, restrict withdrawals, hide listings, and temporarily or permanently limit the account.

rule1.title: 3.1. Illegal, stolen, and fraudulent digital items
rule1.violation: It is prohibited to sell, buy, post, or transfer digital goods, accounts, access credentials, currency, items, services, or other objects obtained unlawfully or connected to hacking, deception, theft, fraud, or unauthorized access.
rule1.measure: The platform may remove content, cancel or restrict related operations, restrict withdrawals, block the account, and apply other security measures.

rule2.title: 3.2. Hacking, phishing, carding, malware, and similar practices
rule2.violation: Offers related to hacking, phishing, carding, malware, security bypass, exploit services, unauthorized access, or facilitation of such activities are prohibited.
rule2.measure: The platform may immediately remove the relevant content, restrict the account, limit operations, and apply a permanent ban without prior warning.

rule3.title: 3.3. Personal data, documents, and confidential information
rule3.violation: It is prohibited to sell, distribute, exchange, or publish personal data, documents, payment information, databases, banking details, or other confidential information where this violates third-party rights, platform rules, or security requirements.
rule3.measure: The platform may remove content, restrict functions, block the account, and take other measures necessary to protect users and the platform.

rule4.title: 3.4. Other unacceptable content and offers
rule4.violation: Erotic or pornographic offers, dangerous or unacceptable digital services, and any other goods, services, or materials that the platform considers incompatible with the safe and lawful operation of the service are prohibited.
rule4.measure: The platform may remove content, deactivate listings, restrict account features, and apply temporary or permanent bans.

section4.title: 4. Consequences of Violations and Special Cases

rule1.title: 4.1. Seller actions causing harm to the buyer
rule1.violation: If, due to the seller's actions or inaction, the buyer receives a block, restriction, loss of a digital item, loss of access, or another significant negative outcome within the subject matter of the transaction, the platform may take this into account when reviewing a dispute or request.
rule1.measure: Depending on the circumstances, the platform may issue a full refund or another refund permitted by the platform's internal logic, restrict the seller's functions, hide the seller's listings, restrict withdrawals, and apply other measures.

rule2.title: 4.2. Individual assessment of the severity of a violation
rule2.violation: The assessment of a violation depends on the nature of the user's actions, the user's behavior history, the level of risk to the platform, the amount of possible harm, and whether the violation is repeated or intentional.
rule2.measure: The platform may apply measures individually, including a warning, content removal, feature restrictions, transaction cancellation, balance and withdrawal restrictions, temporary suspension, or permanent account ban.

footerNote: Each dispute and each violation is reviewed by the platform individually, taking into account the circumstances of the specific situation.
